notes: Wired PassCLI into AppEnvironment.live() via a new LivePassCLI actor wrapper that lazily resolves the `pass` binary through BinaryLocating at first call (keeps live() synchronous). preview() leaves passCLI nil so SwiftUI previews and unit tests never reach for the real binary. Pure pass-stack value types (PassCLI, PassErrorMapper, PassShowParser, PassShowResult, kizbaPassShowDefaultTimeout) marked `nonisolated` so the actor wrapper can construct/invoke them under default-isolation=MainActor. 4 new unit tests; full suite green (145 passed). Release build succeeds.
commits: test(app): add AppEnvironment passCLI wiring tests
